meaning: What You See Is What You Get,所见即所得
examples: WYSIWYG editing makes your word processing smoother and more flexible.
We'd had WYSIWYG editors for a long time.
Why, when I was just a lad, we didn't have fancy WYSIWYG editors.
Jetbox uses a well tested user interface to integrate a content management system, WYSIWYG editor, mailing list, website statistics, user registration, search engine, and a document manager.
